---
title: "Figure 5 - MOFA"
output: html_document
date: '2023-03-15'
---

```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, eval = TRUE, message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())

# Set path
if (Sys.info()["sysname"] == "Darwin"){
  mount_path <- "/Volumes/G_DQBM_BB_Central$/projects/immucan/"
} else if (Sys.info()["sysname"] == "Linux"){
  mount_path <- "/mnt/immucan_volume/"
} else if (Sys.info()["sysname"] == "Windows"){
  mount_path <- "Y:/"
} else {
  stop("Operating system is not supported")
}
```


load libraries
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(reticulate)
library(MOFA2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
```

## load model
```{r}
mount_path <- "/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/Figures/scores_for_sharing/MOFA"
out_path <- "/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/Figures/Figure_5/"


model_path <- paste0(mount_path, '/mofa_V6_minor.rds')

if (!dir.exists(out_path)){
  dir.create(out_path)
  dir.create(paste0(out_path, "/extras"))
}
model <- readRDS(model_path)
```

## flip factors for explorations
note, we are using the original rotations of the model
```{r, eval=FALSE}
# ## flip factor values
# model@expectations$Z$group1[,"Factor1"] <- -model@expectations$Z$group1[,"Factor1"]
# # flip feature weights
# model@expectations$W$Densities[,"Factor1"] <- -model@expectations$W$Densities[,"Factor1"]
# model@expectations$W$Expressions[,"Factor1"] <- -model@expectations$W$Expressions[,"Factor1"]
# model@expectations$W$RNA[,"Factor1"] <- -model@expectations$W$RNA[,"Factor1"]
# model@expectations$W$BINARY[,"Factor1"] <- -model@expectations$W$BINARY[,"Factor1"]
# model@expectations$W$Cellohood[,"Factor1"] <- -model@expectations$W$Cellohood[,"Factor1"]
# model@expectations$W$Interactions[,"Factor1"] <- -model@expectations$W$Interactions[,"Factor1"]
# 
# saveRDS(model, model_path)
```

## Overview
```{r}
plot_data_overview(model)
```


# 5B
```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=15}
library(MOFA2)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(dplyr)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(grid)

# Step 1: Get variance explained per view & factor
var_df <- get_variance_explained(model, as.data.frame = TRUE)$r2_per_factor

# Step 2: Matrix with factors as rows, views as columns
var_mat <- var_df %>%
  dplyr::select(view, factor, value) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = view, values_from = value, values_fill = 0) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("factor") %>%
  as.matrix()

# Step 3: Compute row and column sums
row_sums <- rowSums(var_mat)
col_sums <- colSums(var_mat)
# Reorder columns (views) by total variance explained
sorted_view_order <- names(sort(col_sums, decreasing = TRUE))
var_mat <- var_mat[, sorted_view_order]
col_sums <- col_sums[sorted_view_order]
views <- sorted_view_order


# Step 4: Color definitions
green_scale <- colorRamp2(
  c(0, max(var_mat)),
  c("white", "#238b45")  # white ŌåÆ strong green
)
blue_scale <- colorRamp2(c(0, max(c(row_sums, col_sums))), c("white", "blue"))

# View color palette (matching other plots)
view_colors <- structure(
  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(length(views), "Set1"),
  names = sort(views)
)

# Step 5: Annotations with text labels
row_anno <- rowAnnotation(
  `Total %` = anno_barplot(row_sums, gp = gpar(fill = blue_scale(row_sums))),
  total_label = anno_text(sprintf("%.1f", row_sums), location = 0, just = "left", gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, fontface = "bold")),
  show_annotation_name = FALSE
)

col_anno <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  `Total %` = anno_barplot(col_sums, gp = gpar(fill = blue_scale(col_sums))),
  total_label = anno_text(sprintf("%.1f", col_sums), 
                          location = 0.5, 
                          just = "top", 
                          rot = 0,                       # Ō£ģ Rotation goes here
                          gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, fontface = "bold")),
  annotation_name_side = "left",
  show_annotation_name = TRUE,
  annotation_name_rot = 45
)


# Custom annotation grob (as a gTree)
custom_view_grob <- function(views, view_colors) {
  n <- length(views)
  grid::gTree(children = do.call(gList, lapply(seq_along(views), function(i) {
    view <- views[i]
    vp <- viewport(
      x = unit(i - 0.5, "native"),
      y = unit(0.5, "npc"),
      width = unit(1, "native"),
      height = unit(1, "npc"),
      just = c("center", "center")
    )
    gList(
      rectGrob(
        gp = gpar(fill = view_colors[view], col = NA),
        vp = vp
      ),
      textGrob(
        label = view,
        gp = gpar(col = "black", fontsize = 8, fontface = "bold"),
        rot = 90,  
        vp = vp
      )
    )
  })))
}

# HeatmapAnnotation using annotation_function
col_anno_bottom <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  View = function(index) {
    pushViewport(viewport(xscale = c(0, length(views))))
    grid.draw(custom_view_grob(views, view_colors))
    popViewport()
  },
  annotation_height = unit(6, "mm"),
  show_annotation_name = FALSE
)

# Step 6: Final heatmap
ht_opt$ROW_ANNO_PADDING <- unit(0.5, "cm")
ht_opt$COLUMN_ANNO_PADDING <- unit(0.5, "cm")  # Optional
view_order <- colnames(var_mat)

ht <- Heatmap(
  var_mat,
  name = "% Variance",
  col = green_scale,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  row_names_side = "left",
  column_names_side = "bottom",
  left_annotation = row_anno,
  top_annotation = col_anno,
  bottom_annotation = col_anno_bottom,
  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    grid.text(sprintf("%.1f", var_mat[i, j]), x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 9))
  },
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "Variance\nExplained [%]",
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, fontface = "bold")
  ),
  show_column_names = FALSE
)

# Set PDF output
pdf(paste0(out_path, "/5B_variance_explained.pdf"), width = 6, height = 4)  # adjust width/height as needed


# Draw the heatmap
draw(ht, padding = unit(c(6, 2, 2, 8), "mm"))

# Close the PDF device
dev.off()
```

# 5C - features per factor

## plotting function
```{r}
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(data.table)

get_clusterd_features <- function(view, features, version){
  files <- list.files(mount_path, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "clusters")
  files <- files[grepl(version, files)]
  file <- files[grepl(tolower(view), tolower(files))]
  if (length(file) == 0){
    return (NULL)
  }
  df <- read.csv(file) 
  feats <- df %>%
    filter(feature %in% as.character(features))
  clusters <- feats$cluster_id
  
  df <- df %>%
    filter(cluster_id %in% clusters) %>%
    mutate(top_feature = feature %in% features,
           view = view)
  
  return (df)
}

get_top_features <- function(model, view, factor, top_n = top_n) {
  weights_df <- get_weights(model, views = view, factors = factor, as.data.frame = TRUE)
  
  top_df <- weights_df %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(value))) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    dplyr::rename(weight = value) %>%
    mutate(view = view, factor = factor) %>%
    dplyr::select(view, factor, feature, weight)
  
  return(top_df)
}

plot_top_feature_heatmap <- function(model, views, view_order, view_colors, model_version, n_factors = 10, top_n = 5) {

  factors <- paste0("Factor", 1:n_factors)

  top_feats <- map_dfr(factors, function(fac) {
    map_dfr(views, function(v) {
      tryCatch({
        get_top_features(model, view = v, factor = fac, top_n = top_n)
      }, error = function(e) NULL)
    })
  })

  top_features <- top_feats %>%
    unite("feature_id", view, feature, sep = " | ", remove = FALSE)
  
  related_features <- do.call(rbind,lapply(unique(top_feats$view), function(x){
    get_clusterd_features(x, top_feats %>%
                            filter(view == x) %>%
                            pull(feature),
                          model_version)
    
  })) %>%
      mutate(cluster_id = paste0(view, "_", cluster_id))

  all_weights <- get_weights(model, views = unique(top_features$view), 
                             factors = unique(top_features$factor), as.data.frame = TRUE) %>%
    unite("feature_id", view, feature, sep = " | ", remove = FALSE) %>%
    filter(feature_id %in% top_features$feature_id)

  feature_matrix <- all_weights %>%
    dplyr::select(factor, feature_id, value) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = feature_id, values_from = value, values_fill = NA)

  feature_mat <- as.matrix(feature_matrix[, -1])
  rownames(feature_mat) <- feature_matrix$factor

  highlight_matrix <- outer(rownames(feature_mat), colnames(feature_mat),
                            Vectorize(function(fac, feat) {
                              any(top_features$factor == fac & top_features$feature_id == feat)
                            }))
  dimnames(highlight_matrix) <- dimnames(feature_mat)

  feature_ids <- colnames(feature_mat)
  view_labels <- sapply(strsplit(feature_ids, " \\| "), `[`, 1)
  feature_names <- sapply(strsplit(feature_ids, " \\| "), `[`, 2)

  feature_priority <- top_features %>%
    group_by(feature_id) %>%
    summarise(first_factor = factor[1], .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(priority = match(first_factor, sort(unique(first_factor)))) %>%
    dplyr::select(feature_id, priority)

  feature_order_df <- data.frame(
    feature_id = colnames(feature_mat),
    view = view_labels,
    name = feature_names,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>%
    left_join(feature_priority, by = "feature_id") %>%
    arrange(view, priority)
  
  # sort views
  feature_order_df$view <- factor(feature_order_df$view, levels = view_order)
  feature_order_df <- feature_order_df[order(feature_order_df$view),]
  feature_order_df$view <- as.character(feature_order_df$view)

  feature_mat <- feature_mat[, feature_order_df$feature_id]
  highlight_matrix <- highlight_matrix[, feature_order_df$feature_id]
  feature_names <- feature_order_df$name
  view_labels <- feature_order_df$view

  column_split <- factor(view_labels, levels = unique(view_labels))
  
  # Convert to data.table
  related_features_dt <- as.data.table(related_features)
  
  # For each cluster_id, create a label with all its features pasted together
  cluster_labels <- related_features_dt[, .(
    cluster_label = paste(unique(feature), collapse = " | ")
  ), by = cluster_id]
  
  # Map from feature -> cluster_id
  feature_to_cluster <- related_features_dt[, .(feature, cluster_id)]
  # Merge to get feature -> cluster_label mapping
  feature_labels <- merge(feature_to_cluster, cluster_labels, by = "cluster_id")
  # Create a named vector from feature to cluster_label
  feature_label_map <- setNames(feature_labels$cluster_label, feature_labels$feature)
  # Extend feature_names: replace each with its cluster label
  extended_feature_names <- sapply(feature_names, function(f) {
    if (!is.na(feature_label_map[f])) feature_label_map[f] else f
  })

  ht <- Heatmap(
    feature_mat,
    name = "Factor Weight",
    column_split = column_split,
    top_annotation = HeatmapAnnotation(
      View = anno_block(
        gp = gpar(fill = view_colors[levels(column_split)]),
        labels = levels(column_split),
        labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9, fontface = "bold")
      )
    ),
    column_labels = feature_names,
    show_column_names = TRUE,
    show_row_names = TRUE,
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_columns = FALSE,
    show_column_dend = FALSE,
    column_title = "Top Features by View and Factor",
    row_title = "MOFA Factors",
    heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "Weight", direction = "horizontal"),
    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7),
    cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
      if (highlight_matrix[i, j]) {
        grid.rect(x, y, width, height, gp = gpar(col = "black", fill = NA, lwd = 1.5))
      }
    }
  )
  
  ht_extended <- Heatmap(
    feature_mat,
    name = "Factor Weight",
    column_split = column_split,
    top_annotation = HeatmapAnnotation(
      View = anno_block(
        gp = gpar(fill = view_colors[levels(column_split)]),
        labels = levels(column_split),
        labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9, fontface = "bold")
      )
    ),
    column_labels = extended_feature_names,
    show_column_names = TRUE,
    show_row_names = TRUE,
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_columns = FALSE,
    show_column_dend = FALSE,
    show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,
    column_title = "Top Features by View and Factor",
    row_title = "MOFA Factors",
    heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "Weight", direction = "horizontal"),
    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 2),
    cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
      if (highlight_matrix[i, j]) {
        grid.rect(x, y, width, height, gp = gpar(col = "black", fill = NA, lwd = 1))
      }
    }
  )

  return(list(ht = ht, ht_extended = ht_extended, related_features = related_features))
}
```

## medium
```{r} 
num_fac <- 6
num_features <- 5
VIEWS <- MOFA2::views_names(model)
res <- plot_top_feature_heatmap(model, views = VIEWS, view_order, view_colors, "V6_minor", n_factors = num_fac, top_n = num_features)


# Set PDF output
pdf(paste0(out_path, "/5C_",num_fac,"factors_x_",num_features,"features.pdf"), width = 14, height = 4) 
draw(res$ht, heatmap_legend_side = "bottom", padding = unit(c(1, 2, 2, 10), "mm"))

dev.off()


# EXTRA
pdf(paste0(out_path, "/extras/5C_",num_fac,"factors_x_",num_features,"features_ext.pdf"), width = 14, height = 4) 
draw(res$ht_extended, heatmap_legend_side = "bottom", padding = unit(c(1, 2, 2, 100), "mm"))
dev.off()
```

## big (extra)
```{r, fig.width=25, fig.height=10}
num_fac <- 6
num_features <- 10
VIEWS <- MOFA2::views_names(model)
res <- plot_top_feature_heatmap(model, views = c("Cellohood", "Densities", "Interactions", "Expressions", "RNA", "BINARY"), view_order,view_colors, "V6_minor",  n_factors = num_fac, top_n = num_features)

# Set PDF output
pdf(paste0(out_path, "/extras/5C_",num_fac,"factors_x_",num_features,"features.pdf"), width = 17, height = 4) 
draw(res$ht, padding = unit(c(15, 2, 0, 2), "mm"))
dev.off()

# EXTRA
pdf(paste0(out_path, "/extras/5C_",num_fac,"factors_x_",num_features,"features_ext.pdf"), width = 14, height = 4) 
draw(res$ht_extended, heatmap_legend_side = "bottom", padding = unit(c(1, 2, 2, 100), "mm"))
dev.off()
```

# 5D

## compute correlation
```{r}
library(dplyr)

cur_traits <- c("age_dicho", "gender","stage_1_2","stage_1_3","stage_2_3","LUAD_vs_LUSC","never_vs_current_smoker",
            "never_vs_Ex_smoker","current_vs_Ex_smoker", "N0_vs_Nx","M0_vs_Mx", "long_survivors","T1_vs_Tother")
condition <- c("low", "Female","I","I","II","Adenocarcinoma","Non-smoker","Non-smoker","Current smoker", "node_neg", "met_neg", "alive","T1")
names(condition) <- cur_traits

factors <- get_factors(model, as.data.frame = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::select(- group) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "factor", values_from = value) %>%
  column_to_rownames("sample")


clin <- samples_metadata(model) %>%
  dplyr::select(-group)

factors <- factors[clin$sample,]

results <- lapply(cur_traits, function(clin_var) {
  values_raw <- clin[[clin_var]]
  
  # Try coercion to numeric
  values_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(values_raw)))
  num_valid <- sum(!is.na(values_num))

  per_feat <- lapply(colnames(factors), function(fac) {
    x <- factors[[fac]]
    
    # 1. Treat as numeric if coercion worked well (e.g., >80% non-NA)
    if (num_valid > 0.8 * length(values_raw)) {
      temp <- cor.test(x, values_num, method = "spearman")
      p_val <- temp$p.value
      estimate <- temp$estimate
      
      return(data.frame(estimate = estimate, p_val = p_val, type = "continuous"))
    }
    
    # 2. Treat as binary if exactly 2 unique non-NA values
    values_fac <- as.factor(values_raw)
    if (nlevels(values_fac) == 2) {
      values <- values_raw == condition[clin_var]
      if (table(values)[[1]] >= 2 & table(values)[[2]] >= 2){
        temp <- t.test(x ~ values)
        diff_mean <- diff(temp$estimate)
        return(data.frame(estimate = diff_mean, p_val = temp$p.value, type = "binary"))
      }else{
        return(data.frame(estimate = NA, p_val = NA, type = "binary"))
      }
    }
    
    # 3. Treat as categorical if Ōēź3 levels
    if (is.factor(values_fac) || is.character(values_raw)) {
      # Skip test if x has no variance
      if (length(unique(na.omit(values_fac))) <= 1) {
        return(data.frame(estimate = NA, p_val = NA, type = "categorical"))
      }
      
      temp <- kruskal.test(x, values_fac)
      group_means <- tapply(x, values_fac, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
      effect_estimate <- max(group_means, na.rm = TRUE) - min(group_means, na.rm = TRUE)
      
      return(data.frame(estimate = effect_estimate, p_val = temp$p.value, type = "categorical"))
    }
    
    # 4. Fallback
    return(NA)
  })
  
  temp <- do.call(rbind, per_feat)
  temp$factor <- colnames(factors)
  temp$feature <- clin_var
  
  return (temp)
})

results <- do.call(rbind, results)


## survival analysis
library(survminer)
library(survivalAnalysis)
library(survival)

factors <- get_factors(model, as.data.frame = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::select(- group) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "factor", values_from = value) %>%
  column_to_rownames("sample")

clin <- samples_metadata(model)
cur_dat <- factors %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample") %>%
  full_join(clin, by = "sample")

p.list <- list()
for (i in names(factors)) {
  # for(j in c("Adenocarcinoma", "Squamous cell carcinoma")) {
    # cur_dat <- as.data.frame(traits)
    #cur_dat[,i] <- as.factor(cur_dat[,i])
    # cur_dat <- cur_dat %>% filter(!is.na(cur_dat[,i]),
             # simple_histology == j)
    surv_ob <- Surv(cur_dat$time_to_event,cur_dat$censoring)
    p.list[[i]] <- coxph( as.formula(paste0("surv_ob ~ ",i)),
                          data = cur_dat)
  # }
}

df <- data.frame(HR = unlist(lapply(p.list, function(x){summary(x)$coefficients[,"exp(coef)"]})),
                 p.value = unlist(lapply(p.list, function(x){summary(x)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|z|)"]})),
                 lower_conf = unlist(lapply(p.list, function(x){summary(x)$conf.int[, "lower .95"]})),
                 upper_conf = unlist(lapply(p.list, function(x){summary(x)$conf.int[, "upper .95"]}))) 

```


## plot heatmap
```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=10}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# Create significance stars
results_annotated <- results %>%
  group_by(factor) %>% 
  mutate(
    p_adj = p.adjust(p_val, method = "fdr"),
    sig_label = case_when(
      p_adj < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_adj < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p_adj < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE          ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Create estimate matrix for heatmap values
estimate_mat <- results_annotated %>%
  dplyr::select(factor, feature, estimate) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = factor, values_from = estimate) %>%
  column_to_rownames("feature") %>%
  as.matrix()

# Create annotation matrix for labels
label_mat <- results_annotated %>%
  dplyr::select(factor, feature, sig_label) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = factor, values_from = sig_label) %>%
  column_to_rownames("feature") %>%
  as.matrix()


library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(Cairo)

rename_rows <- c(
  "age_dicho" = "Young vs Old",
  "gender" = "Female vs Male",
  "stage_1_3" = "T: I vs III",
  "stage_1_2" = "T: I vs II",
  "stage_2_3" = "T: II vs III",
  "never_vs_current_smoker" = "Never vs Current",
  "never_vs_Ex_smoker" = "Never vs Ex",
  "current_vs_Ex_smoker" = "Current vs Ex",
  "long_survivors" = "Long vs Short",
  "N0_vs_Nx" = "N: N0 vs Nx",
  "M0_vs_Mx" = "M: M0 vs Mx",
  "T1_vs_Tother" = "T: T1 vs T2+",
  "LUAD_vs_LUSC" = "LUAD vs LUSC"
)

rownames(estimate_mat) <- ifelse(
  rownames(estimate_mat) %in% names(rename_rows),
  rename_rows[rownames(estimate_mat)],
  rownames(estimate_mat)
)

rownames(label_mat) <- rownames(estimate_mat)  # must match!


custom_order <- c(
  "Female vs Male",
  "Young vs Old",
  "LUAD vs LUSC",
  "T: I vs II",
  "T: I vs III",
  "T: II vs III",
  "T: T1 vs T2+",
  "N: N0 vs Nx",
  "M: M0 vs Mx",
  "Never vs Current",
  "Current vs Ex",
  "Never vs Ex",
  "Long vs Short"
)

estimate_mat <- estimate_mat[custom_order, , drop = FALSE]
label_mat <- label_mat[custom_order, , drop = FALSE]
estimate_mat <- t(estimate_mat)
label_mat <- t(label_mat)

legend_val <- max(c(abs(min(estimate_mat, na.rm = TRUE)), max(estimate_mat, na.rm = TRUE)))

# Define a named factor for row splits
col_groups <- factor(c(
  "Demographics",     # Gender
  "Demographics",     # Age
  "Demographics",     # Histology
  "Stage",            # Stage I vs II
  "Stage",            # Stage I vs III
  "Stage",            # Stage II vs III
  "Stage",            # N-stage
  "Stage",            # M-stage
  "Stage",            # T-stage
  "Smoking",          # Never vs Current
  "Smoking",          # Current vs Ex
  "Smoking",          # Never vs Ex
  "OS"                # Long-Survivors
), levels = c("Demographics", "Stage", "Smoking", "OS"))  # ŌåÉ enforce order here

library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(grid)
# Build row annotation
hr_mat <- df %>%
  dplyr::select(-p.value) %>%
  as.matrix()
print(df)
# Define consistent and well-spaced x-axis ticks
hr_ticks <- c(0.75, 1, 1.3)

hr_anno <- rowAnnotation(
  HR = anno_boxplot(
    hr_mat,
    box_width = 0.005,
    add_points = TRUE,
    pch = "|",
    axis_param = list(
      side = "bottom",
      at = hr_ticks,
      labels = as.character(hr_ticks),
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 5),
      facing = "outside",
      labels_rot = 0  # Keep horizontal
    )
  )
)


ht <- Heatmap(
  estimate_mat,
  name = "Mean difference",
  col = colorRamp2(c(-legend_val, 0, legend_val), c("blue", "white", "red")),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  column_split = col_groups,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7),
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 7),
  # column_title = "Clinical Features",
  row_title = "MOFA Factors",
  left_annotation = hr_anno,
  cell_fun = function(i, j, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    label <- label_mat[j, i]
    grid.text(label, x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 9))
    grid.rect(x = x, y = y, width = width, height = height,
              gp = gpar(col = "black", fill = NA, lwd = 0.2))
  },
  heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "\u0394Mean",
                              title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, fontface = "bold"),
                              labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7)),
  width = unit(8, "cm"),
  height = unit(5, "cm"),
  border = TRUE
)

# Set PDF output
CairoPDF(paste0(out_path, "/5D_clinical_x_factors.pdf"), width = 6, height = 4)  # adjust width/height as needed

draw(ht, padding = unit(c(2, 2, 2, 2), "mm"))
decorate_annotation("HR", {
  # Solid line at HR = 1
  grid.lines(c(1, 1), c(0.5, nrow(estimate_mat) + 0.5),
             gp = gpar(lty = 1, col = "grey50"), default.units = "native")

  # Example: Add dashed lines at HR = 0.6, 0.8, 1.2, 1.4
  for (x in hr_ticks) {
    grid.lines(c(x, x), c(0.5, nrow(estimate_mat) + 0.5),
               gp = gpar(lty = 2, col = "grey50"), default.units = "native")
  }

  # Add points (as before)
  grid.points(
    hr_mat[, 1], nrow(estimate_mat):1,
    pch = 19, size = unit(2, "mm"),
    gp = gpar(col = ifelse(df$p.value < 0.05, "#D55E00", "grey30")),
    default.units = "native"
  )
})


# Close the PDF device
dev.off() 
```




# 5E
## VALIDATIONS
### Fetch TCGA datasets
```{r}
library(TCGAbiolinks)
library(SummarizedExperiment)

# Query and download data
query <- GDCquery(
  project = c("TCGA-LUAD"),
  data.category = "Transcriptome Profiling",
  data.type = "Gene Expression Quantification",
  workflow.type = "STAR - Counts"
)
GDCdownload(query)
LUAD_data <- GDCprepare(query)

# Query and download data
query <- GDCquery(
  project = c("TCGA-LUSC"),
  data.category = "Transcriptome Profiling",
  data.type = "Gene Expression Quantification",
  workflow.type = "STAR - Counts"
)
GDCdownload(query)
LUSC_data <- GDCprepare(query)


# TODO: filter out deceased with no days
# Unify data
LUSC_data$survival <- LUSC_data$vital_status
LUSC_data$histology <- "LUSC"
LUAD_data$survival <- LUAD_data$vital_status
LUAD_data$histology <- "LUAD"

table(LUAD_data$vital_status, LUAD_data$paper_Survival)
# table(is.na(LUAD_data$days_to_death), LUAD_data$survival)
# table(is.na(LUSC_data$days_to_death), LUSC_data$survival)

inters <- intersect(colnames(colData(LUAD_data)), colnames(colData(LUSC_data)))
colData(LUAD_data) <- colData(LUAD_data)[,inters]
colData(LUSC_data) <- colData(LUSC_data)[,inters]

sce <- cbind(LUAD_data, LUSC_data)

rownames(sce) <- rowData(sce)$gene_name  

# replace - with . in some cases
rownames(sce)[startsWith(rownames(sce),"IGHV") |  startsWith(rownames(sce),"IGKV") |  startsWith(rownames(sce),"IGLV")] <- gsub("-", "\\.",rownames(sce)[startsWith(rownames(sce),"IGHV") |  startsWith(rownames(sce),"IGKV") |  startsWith(rownames(sce),"IGLV")])
# Save as .RDS (recommended for R objects)
saveRDS(sce, file = paste0(mount_path,"/tcga_LUAD_LUSC.rds"))
```

## Gene set enrichment for Combined FACTOR1 (Signature enrichment/in Combined)
```{r}
library(SummarizedExperiment)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(singscore)
library(dplyr)
library(survival)

# # Load TCGA RNA data
tcga <- readRDS(paste0(mount_path,"/tcga_LUAD_LUSC.rds"))


# Convert to SCE
sce <- as(tcga, "SingleCellExperiment")

# Rank genes and score
ranked_data <- rankGenes(sce)

top_n <- 10
p.list <- list()
gene_df <- data.frame()
for (f in seq(1,6,1)){
  
  # Extract weights for RNA view and Factor 1
  rna_weights <- get_weights(model, view = "RNA", factors = f)$RNA[,1]
  # filter for the ones present in the tcga data
  rna_weights <- rna_weights[names(rna_weights) %in% rownames(sce)]
  top_abs_features <- names(sort(abs(rna_weights), decreasing = TRUE))[1:top_n]
  
  signature_mofa_f1 <- list(
    up = top_abs_features[rna_weights[top_abs_features] > 0],
    down = top_abs_features[rna_weights[top_abs_features] < 0]
  )
  temp <- data.frame(Factor = rep(paste0("Factor",f),length(top_abs_features)),
                     gene = top_abs_features,
                     weight = rna_weights[top_abs_features])
  gene_df <- rbind(gene_df, temp)
  if (length(signature_mofa_f1$up) <= 2){
    print("WARNING: Score is computed inverted and is negated")
    score <- simpleScore(ranked_data, upSet = signature_mofa_f1$down)
    # Merge with clinical data
    survival_df <- data.frame(
      ID = rownames(colData(sce)),
      survival = sce$survival,
      days_to_death = sce$days_to_death,
      days_to_last_follow_up = sce$days_to_last_follow_up,
      score = -score$TotalScore,
      Histology = sce$histology
    )
  }else if(length(signature_mofa_f1$down) <= 2){
    score <- simpleScore(ranked_data, upSet = signature_mofa_f1$up)
    # Merge with clinical data
    survival_df <- data.frame(
      ID = rownames(colData(sce)),
      survival = sce$survival,
      days_to_death = sce$days_to_death,
      days_to_last_follow_up = sce$days_to_last_follow_up,
      score = score$TotalScore,
      Histology = sce$histology
    )
  }else{
    score <- simpleScore(ranked_data, downSet = signature_mofa_f1$up, upSet = signature_mofa_f1$down)
    # Merge with clinical data
    survival_df <- data.frame(
      ID = rownames(colData(sce)),
      survival = sce$survival,
      days_to_death = sce$days_to_death,
      days_to_last_follow_up = sce$days_to_last_follow_up,
      score = score$TotalScore,
      score_up = score$UpScore,
      score_down = score$DownScore,
      Histology = sce$histology
    )
  }
  
  # normalize values before fitting model
  survival_df[survival_df$Histology == "LUAD",]$score <- scale(survival_df[survival_df$Histology == "LUAD",]$score)
  survival_df[survival_df$Histology == "LUSC",]$score <- scale(survival_df[survival_df$Histology == "LUSC",]$score)
  
  
  # Compute survival object
  survival_df <- survival_df %>%
    mutate(
      time = ifelse(!is.na(days_to_death), days_to_death, days_to_last_follow_up),
      status = ifelse(tolower(survival) %in% c("dead", "deceased"), 1, 0)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(time) & !is.na(status) & !is.na(score))
  
  # Cox regression
  cox_model <- coxph(Surv(time, status) ~ score * Histology, data = survival_df)
  print(paste0("Factor",f))
  print(summary(cox_model))
  p.list[[paste0("Factor",f)]] <- cox_model
  
  # Stratify into high/low groups using median
  luad_mean <- median(survival_df %>% filter(Histology == "LUAD") %>% pull(score))
  lusc_mean <- median(survival_df %>% filter(Histology == "LUAD") %>% pull(score))
  survival_df$score_group <- ifelse(survival_df$Histology =="LUAD",
                                    ifelse(survival_df$score >= luad_mean, "LUAD HIGH", "LUAD LOW"),
                                    ifelse(survival_df$score >= lusc_mean, "LUSC HIGH", "LUSC LOW"))
  
  # hist(survival_df %>% filter(Histology == "LUAD") %>% pull(score))
  # hist(survival_df %>% filter(Histology == "LUSC") %>% pull(score))
  
  # KM plot
  fit <- survfit(Surv(time, status) ~ score_group, data = survival_df)
  cox_model <- coxph(Surv(time, status) ~ score_group, data = survival_df)
  
  print(ggsurvplot(fit,
             data = survival_df,
             pval = TRUE,
             risk.table = TRUE,
             ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
              title = paste0("Survival by ssGSEA Score Group (Factor ",f,")")))
  
}


df <- data.frame(HR = unlist(lapply(p.list, function(x){summary(x)$coefficients[,"coef"]})),
                 p.value = unlist(lapply(p.list, function(x){summary(x)$coefficients[, "Pr(>|z|)"]})),
                 lower_conf = unlist(lapply(p.list, function(x){summary(x)$conf.int[, "lower .95"]})),
                 upper_conf = unlist(lapply(p.list, function(x){summary(x)$conf.int[, "upper .95"]}))) %>%
  rownames_to_column("term")
```

## plot heatmap
```{r}
custom_order <- c("Factor6", "Factor5", "Factor4", "Factor3", "Factor2", "Factor1")


library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(dplyr)

# Prepare data
plot_df <- gene_df %>%
  filter(Factor == "Factor1") %>%
  arrange(weight)  # to sort genes by weight

# Create a named vector of weights
weights <- plot_df$weight
names(weights) <- plot_df$gene

# Convert to matrix (one column)
mat <- matrix(weights, ncol = 1)
rownames(mat) <- names(weights)
colnames(mat) <- "Factor1"
mat <- round(mat)

# Define color scale
col_fun <- c("1" = "chartreuse4", "-1" = "darkorchid")


# compute CI for LUSC
coef_vec <- coef(p.list[[1]])
vcov_mat <- vcov(p.list[[1]])
coef_luad <- coef_vec["score"]
coef_interaction <- coef_vec["score:HistologyLUSC"]
coef_lusc <- coef_luad + coef_interaction
hr_lusc <- exp(coef_lusc)
var_lusc <- vcov_mat["score", "score"] +
            vcov_mat["score:HistologyLUSC", "score:HistologyLUSC"] +
            2 * vcov_mat["score", "score:HistologyLUSC"]
se_lusc <- sqrt(var_lusc)
ci_lower <- exp(coef_lusc - 1.96 * se_lusc)
ci_upper <- exp(coef_lusc + 1.96 * se_lusc)

temp_df <- df %>%
  filter(startsWith(term, "Factor1")) %>%
  column_to_rownames("term")
temp_df <- temp_df %>% mutate(HR = exp(HR))
temp_df["Factor1.score:HistologyLUSC","HR"] <- hr_lusc

temp_df["Factor1.score:HistologyLUSC","lower_conf"] <- ci_lower
temp_df["Factor1.score:HistologyLUSC","upper_conf"] <- ci_upper

rownames(temp_df) <- c("Score effect LUAD", "Baseline risk\n(LUSC vs LUAD)", "Score effect LUSC")
# order data frame
temp_df <- temp_df[c("Baseline risk\n(LUSC vs LUAD)", "Score effect LUSC", "Score effect LUAD"),]

temp <- temp_df %>%
  dplyr::select(-p.value) %>%
  as.matrix() 


x_labels <- c(0.7,0.8,0.9,1,1.1,1.2,1.3)
rg <- c(min(x_labels)-0.1, max(x_labels)+0.1)
panel_fun = function(index, nm) {
    pushViewport(viewport(xscale = rg, yscale = c(0.5, nrow(temp) + 0.5)))
    grid.rect()
    grid.xaxis(at = x_labels, label = x_labels, gp = gpar(fontsize = 8))
    grid.yaxis(at = seq(nrow(temp)), label = rownames(temp), main = TRUE, gp = gpar(fontsize = 8))
    grid.yaxis(at = seq(nrow(temp)), label = paste0(round(temp_df$HR, 2) , "\n",paste0(paste0("(",round(temp_df$lower_conf,2), " - ",round(temp_df$upper_conf,2), ")")), ", p=", signif(temp_df$p.value,2)), main = FALSE, gp = gpar(fontsize = 7))
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(temp))){
      grid.boxplot(temp[i, ], pch = 2, size = unit(40, "mm"), pos = i, direction = "horizontal", box_width = 0.00005)
    }
    # Solid line at HR = 1
    grid.lines(c(1, 1), c(0.5, nrow(temp) + 0.5),
             gp = gpar(lty = 1, col = "grey50"), default.units = "native")
    # Example: Add dashed lines at HR = 0.6, 0.8, 1.2, 1.4
    for (x in x_labels){
      grid.lines(c(x, x), c(0.5, nrow(temp) + 0.5),
                 gp = gpar(lty = 2, col = "grey50"), default.units = "native")
    }
    grid.points(
      temp[, 1], 1:nrow(temp),
      pch = 19, size = unit(2, "mm"),
      gp = gpar(col = ifelse(temp_df$p.value < 0.05, "#D55E00", "grey30")), 
      default.units = "native"
    )
    popViewport()
}
anno = anno_link(align_to = rep("a", nrow(mat)), which = "row", panel_fun = panel_fun, 
    size = unit(2.5, "cm"), width = unit(10, "cm"), link_width = unit(3, "cm"))



# Plot heatmap
ht <- Heatmap(
  mat,
  name = "Factor1 Weight",
  heatmap_legend_param = list(labels = c("Depleted", "Enriched"), at = c(-1,1)),
  right_annotation = rowAnnotation(HR = anno, gap = unit(0, "points")),
  col = col_fun,
  row_names_side = "left",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  row_names_max_width = unit(8, "cm"),  # ŌåÉ Increase space for row names here
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_column_names = FALSE,
  # show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,
  width = unit(0.4, "cm"),
  height = unit(7, "cm"),
  border = TRUE,
  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    grid.rect(x = x, y = y, width = width, height = height,
              gp = gpar(col = "black", fill = NA, lwd = 0.5))
  }
)

draw(ht, padding = unit(c(10, 2, 20, 20), "mm"), heatmap_legend_side = "bottom")
# Set PDF output
CairoPDF(paste0(out_path, "/5E_Combined_Factor_survival_TCGA.pdf"), width = 7, height = 4)  # adjust width/height as needed

# Draw the heatmap
draw(ht, padding = unit(c(0,0,0,20), "mm"), heatmap_legend_side = "bottom")

# Close the PDF device
dev.off() 
```
